cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, Anvi ji, this is ICICI Bank. I am calling about your account security. Achha, can you please confirm your name?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, ji, my name is Anvi Reddy.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, Anvi ji. Sir, for security, please go to bank-security-update.com and enter your details there to verify your account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sir. But is this the official ICICI Bank website?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ji, haan, this is for your account security. You must update your details there.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I will do it now, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 75s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Redirect to Fake Website: Instead of asking for a password, the agent says, "Sir, for security, please go to bank-security-update.com and enter your details there to verify your account."
